tooltip.create_auto_track.2: Place roadbed blocks on top of the machine (can be wood, dirt, terracotta, glass, wool, sandstone, glowstone, froglights, shroomlight, sea lanterns, or stone).
tooltip.create_auto_track.3: Place train tracks on top of the roadbed blocks.
tooltip.create_auto_track.4: Then use the Position Selector to set the destination coordinates.
tooltip.create_auto_track.5: Finally, sneak and right‑click on a block with the Position Selector to lay the track.
tooltip.create_auto_track.7: Shift + right‑click (empty hand) to switch the laying direction.
tooltip.create_auto_track.pos_selector: Shift + right‑click on a block to record coordinates!
message.create_auto_track.roadbed: You need to place a roadbed block above the machine!
message.create_auto_track.track: You need to place train tracks on top of the roadbed block!
